case_title: ZIPKICK INC, A CORPORATION VS. LNL FOODS INC, A CORPORATION ET AL

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZIPKICK INC, A CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT LNL FOODS INC, A CORPORATION DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-27-2020

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 66170044), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZIPKICK INC, A CORPORATION SERVED NOV-08-2020, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LNL FOODS INC, A CORPORATION
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100138821) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZIPKICK INC, A CORPORATION

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-27-2020 CONTINUED TO FEB-23-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-23-2021 CONTINUED TO APR-20-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). *** NOTE: DEFENDANT'S BANKRUPTCY WAS TERMINATED DEC-21-2020. *** NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100138821) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-21-2021 CONTINUED TO DEC-21-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZIPKICK INC, A CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LNL FOODS INC, A CORPORATION $11,148.90 PRINCIPAL, $960.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $2,084.69 INTEREST, $515.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $14,708.59, SEE SCANNED DOC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-19-2022 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
